defs: n	(sometimes attributive) The light reflected from the Moon (which seems as if it emanates from it).
v	To work on the side (at a secondary job), often in the evening or during the night.
v	(by extension) To engage in an activity other than what one is known for.
v	(by extension, of an inanimate object) To perform a secondary function substantially different from its supposed primary function, as in protein moonlighting.
v	(British, dated) To carry out undeclared work.
n	The ocean; the continuous body of salt water covering a majority of the Earth's surface.
n	A large body of salt water.
n	A body of salt water smaller than an ocean, generally forming part of, or connecting with, an ocean or a larger sea.
n	A lake, especially if large or if salty or brackish.
n	The swell of the sea, especially when high or rough.
n	A single wave; billow.
n	(attributive, in combination) Living or used in or on the sea; of, near, or like the sea.
n	(figurative) Anything resembling the vastness or turbulence of the sea in mass, size or quantity.
n	(planetology) A very large lake of liquid hydrocarbon.
n	(planetology) A large, dark plain of rock; a mare.
n	(physics) A constant flux of gluons splitting into quarks, which annihilate to produce further gluons.
n	Synonym of Mediterranean Sea.
n	A surname.
n	A hamlet in Ilminster parish, South Somerset district, Somerset, England (OS grid ref ST3413).

n	Initialism of Southeast Asia. [A geographic region of Asia, comprising the territories of Brunei, Cambodia, East Timor, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar (Burma), the Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, and Vietnam.]
n	(sports) Abbreviation of Seattle. [A seaport and the largest city in Washington, United States, and the county seat of King County.]
n	Initialism of Strategic Environmental Assessment.
n	Initialism of Single European Act.
adj	Very small.
n	Anything very small.
n	A small child; an infant.
n	A nickname.
n	A township in Simcoe County, Ontario, Canada.
n	An unincorporated community in Dickenson County, Virginia, United States.

n	An animal of the clade (traditionally class) Aves in the phylum Chordata, characterized by being warm-blooded, having feathers and wings usually capable of flight, having a beaked mouth, and laying eggs.
n	(cooking, slang) A chicken or turkey used as food.
n	(UK, Ireland, colloquial) A girl or woman, especially one considered sexually attractive.
n	(UK, Ireland, colloquial, by extension) A girlfriend.
n	(slang) A man, fellow.
n	(slang) An aircraft.
n	(slang) A satellite.
n	(slang, US) A kilogram of cocaine.
n	(slang, Canada, Philippines) A penis.
n	(informal) Snowbird (retiree who moves to a warmer climate).
v	(intransitive) To observe or identify wild birds in their natural environment.
v	(intransitive) To catch or shoot birds; to hunt birds.
v	(intransitive, figuratively) To seek for game or plunder; to thieve.
n	(slang) A prison sentence.
v	(transitive, slang) To bring into prison, to roof.
n	(UK, with definite article, chiefly in phrases) Booing and jeering, especially as done by an audience expressing displeasure at a performer.
n	(with definite article) The vulgar hand gesture in which the middle finger is extended.
adj	(Canada, colloquial, of a school or university course) Able to be passed with very little work; having the nature of a bird course.
n	A yardbird.
n	(obsolete) A chicken; the young of a fowl; a young eaglet; a nestling.
v	(transitive, television) To transmit via satellite.
n	(jazz) Charlie Parker (1920–1955), Jazz saxophonist.
n	A surname.
n	A surname from Chinese.
n	A surname from Korean.
n	A surname from Khmer.

n	Alternative form of sheng (“Chinese wind instrument”). [A Chinese wind instrument, a free-reed mouth organ consisting of 13 or more bamboo pipes of various lengths, which are fixed at their bases in a wind chest made from a dried gourd (or, more recently, wood or chrome-plated brass).]
n	A female.
v	(transitive) To refer to (someone) using she/her pronouns.
n	A language of the Hmong-Mien language family spoken by the She people.
n	An ethnic group in southern China.
n	Initialism of safety, health, environment. [The condition or feeling of being safe; security; certainty.]
n	Initialism of standard hydrogen electrode. [(physics, chemistry) An electrode with a standard electrode potential of zero; used as a standard against which other electrodes are measured.]
n	Initialism of superheavy element. [A chemical element with an extremely high atomic number; typically taken to mean beyond lawrencium (element 103, the last actinide)]
n	A nickname of the surname Walker.
n	(uncountable) The quality of being (especially visually) attractive, pleasing, fine or good-looking; comeliness.
n	Someone who is beautiful.
n	(in the plural) Those aspects or elements that make someone or something beautiful.
n	Something that is particularly good or pleasing.
n	An excellent or egregious example of something.
n	(with the definite article) The excellence or genius of a scheme or decision.
n	Beauty treatment; cosmetology.
adj	(Canada) Of high quality, well done.
n	(obsolete) Prevailing style or taste; rage; fashion.
n	(archaic, in the plural) Beautiful passages or extracts of poetry.
n	(particle physics, obsolete) A beauty quark (now called bottom quark).
v	(obsolete, transitive) To make beautiful.
adj	Light in color.
adj	(of human skin) Having a pallor (a light color, especially due to sickness, shock, fright etc.).
adj	Feeble, faint.
v	(intransitive) To turn pale; to lose colour.
v	(intransitive) To become insignificant.
v	(transitive) To make pale; to diminish the brightness of.
n	A wooden stake; a picket.
n	(by extension) Limits, bounds (especially before of).
n	(heraldry) A vertical band down the middle of a shield.
n	A cheese scoop.
v	To enclose with pales, or as if with pales; to encircle or encompass; to fence off.
n	(obsolete) Paleness; pallor.
n	(archaic) A fence made from wooden stake; palisade.
n	(archaic) A territory or defensive area within a specific boundary or under a given jurisdiction.
n	(historical) The parts of Ireland under English jurisdiction.
n	(historical) The territory around Calais under English control (from the 14th to 16th centuries).
n	(historical) A portion of Russia in which Jews were permitted to live (the Pale of Settlement).
n	(archaic) The jurisdiction (territorial or otherwise) of an authority.
n	(historical) The part of Ireland directly under the control of the English government in the Late Middle Ages.
n	(informal, by extension of Moon) Any natural satellite of a planet.
n	A representation of the moon, usually as a crescent or as a circle with a face; a crescent-shaped shape, symbol, or object.
n	(literary) A month, particularly a lunar month.
n	The eighteenth trump/major arcana card of the tarot.
n	(card games) In hearts, the action of taking all the point cards in one hand.
v	(transitive, colloquial) To display one's buttocks to, typically as a jest, insult, or protest.
v	(intransitive, colloquial) To gaze at lovingly or in adoration.
v	(intransitive, colloquial) (usually followed by over or after) To fuss over something adoringly; to be infatuated with someone.
v	To spend time idly, absent-mindedly.
v	(transitive) To expose to the rays of the Moon.
v	(transitive) To adorn with moons or crescents.
v	(cryptocurrencies, of a coin or token) To rise in price rapidly or suddenly.
n	A crescent-like outwork in a fortification.
n	(cartomancy) The thirty-second Lenormand card.
v	(card games) To shoot the moon.
n	The Earth's moon; the sole natural satellite of the Earth, represented in astronomy and astrology by ☾.
n	(paganism, mythology) A personification of the moon.
n	The 54th sura (chapter) of the Qur'an.
n	A surname.
n	A number of places in the United States:
n	An unincorporated community in Morgan County, Kentucky.
n	A township in Allegheny County, Pennsylvania.
n	A ghost town in Pennington County, South Dakota.
n	An unincorporated community in Mathews County, Virginia.
n	An unincorporated community in Marathon County, Wisconsin.

n	(with "the", singular only) Alternative letter-case form of Moon (“the Earth's only permanent natural satellite”). [The Earth's moon; the sole natural satellite of the Earth, represented in astronomy and astrology by ☾.]
n	The lungs, now chiefly of an animal (being lighter than adjacent parts).
adj	With little or no sound; free of disturbing noise.
adj	Having little motion or activity; calm.
adj	Not talking much or not talking loudly; reserved.
adj	Not busy, of low quantity.
adj	Not showy; undemonstrative.
n	The absence of sound; quietness.
n	The absence of movement; stillness, tranquility.
n	The absence of disturbance or trouble; peace, security.

v	(intransitive) To become quiet or calm.
adj	(software) Requiring little or no interaction.
adj	Not large or big; insignificant; few in number.
adj	Humiliated or insignificant.
adj	Having a small penis, muscles, or other important body parts, regardless of overall body size.
adj	(figuratively, not comparable) Young, as a child.
adj	(writing, not comparable) Minuscule or lowercase, referring to written or printed letters.
adj	Evincing little worth or ability; not large-minded; paltry; mean.
adj	Not prolonged in duration; not extended in time; short.
adj	Synonym of little (“of an industry or institution(s) therein: operating on a small scale, unlike larger counterparts”).
adj	(especially clothing, food or drink) That is small (the manufactured size).
adv	In a small fashion
adv	In or into small pieces.
n	(uncountable, especially clothing, food or drink) One of several common sizes to which an item may be manufactured.
n	(countable, especially clothing, food or drink) An item labelled or denoted as being that size.
n	(countable, especially with respect to clothing) One who fits an item of that size.
v	(intransitive) To become small; to dwindle.
adj	(archaic) Slender, gracefully slim.
adv	(obsolete) To a small extent.
adv	(obsolete) In a low tone; softly.
n	(countable, rare) Any part of something that is smaller or slimmer than the rest, now usually with anatomical reference to the back.
v	(obsolete, transitive) To make little or less.
n	A surname.
n	A surname from Chinese.
n	A surname from Korean.
n	A surname from Khmer.

n	Alternative form of sheng (“Chinese wind instrument”). [A Chinese wind instrument, a free-reed mouth organ consisting of 13 or more bamboo pipes of various lengths, which are fixed at their bases in a wind chest made from a dried gourd (or, more recently, wood or chrome-plated brass).]
n	(uncountable) A deep caring for the existence of another.
n	(uncountable) Strong affection.
n	A profound and caring affection towards someone.
n	A feeling of intense attraction towards someone.
n	(countable) A person who is the object of romantic feelings; a darling, a sweetheart, a beloved.
n	A deep or abiding liking for something; an enthusiasm for something.
n	Affectionate, benevolent concern or care for other people or beings, and for their well-being.
v	(usually transitive, sometimes intransitive, stative) To have a strong affection for (someone or something).
v	(usually transitive, sometimes intransitive) To seek the good or honor of (someone), care deeply about, to be dedicated to (someone or something).
n	(euphemistic) Sexual desire; attachment based on sexual attraction.
n	(euphemistic) Sexual activity.
n	An instance or episode of being in love; a love affair.
n	Used as the closing, before the signature, of a letter, especially between good friends or family members, or by the young.
n	A thing, activity, etc. which is the object of one's deep liking or enthusiasm.
v	(transitive) To be strongly inclined towards something; an emphatic form of like.
v	(transitive) To need, thrive on.
v	(transitive, euphemistic) To have sex with (perhaps from make love).
v	(transitive, sometimes ironic) To derive delight from a fact or situation.

n	(colloquial, Commonwealth) A term of friendly address, regardless of feelings.
v	to virtuously prioritize something over yourself.
n	(racquet sports, billiards) Zero, no score.
n	Nothing; no recompense.

n	Alternative letter-case form of Love (“personification of love”). [(World War II era, joint US/RAF) radiotelephony clear-code word for the letter L.]
v	Alternative form of lofe (“to praise, sell”). [(transitive, UK dialectal or obsolete) To praise; commend.]
adj	(of a thing) Having a low temperature.
adj	(of the weather) Causing the air to be cold.
adj	(of a person or animal) Feeling the sensation of coldness, especially to the point of discomfort.
adj	Unfriendly; emotionally distant or unfeeling.
adj	Chilled, filled with an uncomfortable sense of fear, dread, or alarm.
adj	Dispassionate; not prejudiced or partisan; impartial.
adj	Completely unprepared; without introduction.
adj	Unconscious or deeply asleep; deprived of the metaphorical heat associated with life or consciousness.

adj	(usually with "have" transitively) Cornered; done for.
adj	(slang) Cool, impressive.
adj	Affecting the sense of smell (as of hunting dogs) only feebly; having lost its odour.
adj	Distant; said, in the game of hunting for some object, of a seeker remote from the thing concealed. Compare warm and hot.
adj	(painting) Having a bluish effect; not warm in colour.
adj	(databases) Rarely used or accessed, and thus able to be relegated to slower storage.
adj	(informal) Without compassion; heartless; ruthless.
adj	(informal) Not radioactive.
adj	(firearms) Not loaded with a round of live ammunition.
adj	Without electrical power being supplied.

n	(with 'the', figurative) A harsh place; a place of abandonment.

n	(uncountable, slang) Rheum; sleepy dust.

adj	(obsolete) Not pungent or acrid.

adj	(obsolete) Not sensitive; not acute.

n	(countable) The time when the Sun is below the horizon when the sky is dark.
n	(uncountable) Nightfall.
n	(uncountable) Darkness (due to it being nighttime).
n	(countable) An evening or night spent at a particular activity.
n	(countable) A day, or at least a night.

n	(astronomy, countable) The period of darkness beginning at the end of evening astronomical twilight when the sun is 18 degrees below the horizon, and ending at the beginning of morning astronomical twilight.
n	(law, countable) A period of time often defined in the legal system as beginning 30 minutes after sunset, and ending 30 minutes before sunrise.
n	(sports, colloquial) A night's worth of competitions, generally one game.
n	(uncountable) A dark blue colour, midnight blue.

n	The 92nd sura (chapter) of the Qur'an.
n	(Germanic paganism) The goddess of the night in Heathenry.
N	"Held" is a song by Smog, released as his first single from his 1999 album Knock Knock.
N	a 2023 novel by writer and poet Anne Michaels, published by Knopf, a subsidiary of Penguin Random House.
n	(with "the" or a plural possessive pronoun) The subjective human experience, regarded collectively; human collective existence; existence in general; the reality we live in.
n	(with "the" or a singular possessive pronoun) The subjective human experience, regarded individually.
n	(with "the") The Earth, especially in a geopolitical or cultural context, or as the physical planet.
n	(metonymic, with "the") A majority of people.
n	The Universe.
n	(with "a") Any of several possible scenarios concerning The Earth, either as the physical planet, or in a geopolitical, cultural or societal context.
n	(countable) (Several) alternative scenarios concerning The Earth, either as the physical planet, or in a geopolitical, cultural or societal context.
n	(countable) A planet, especially one which is inhabited or inhabitable.
n	(by extension) Any other astronomical body which may be inhabitable, such as a natural satellite.
n	In various mythologies, cosmologies, etc., one of a number of separate realms or regions having different characteristics and occupied by different types of inhabitants.
n	A fictional realm, such as a planet, containing one or multiple societies of beings, especially intelligent ones.
n	An individual or group perspective or social setting.

n	(video games) A subdivision of a game, consisting of a series of stages or levels that usually share a similar environment or theme.
n	(tarot) The twenty-second trump or major arcana card of the tarot.
n	A very large extent of country.
n	(archaic) Age, era.
n	Earth: the Earth (our earth).
n	The Universe: our universe.
n	The specific world, or any of several specific constituent worlds, that humans live in, among any other (real or possible) worlds:
n	Existence.
n	Any of the (conceptually figurative) worlds that constitute (or have formerly been asserted to constitute) the world, as for example:
n	The Industrialized World (the industrialized world).
n	The Developed World (the developed world).
n	The Developing World (the developing world).
n	The Third World (the third world).
n	The First World (the first world).
